When we sat together, she finally broke down.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               Caitlin Dickerson is a staff writer at                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       The Atlantic                                                                                                                                                                          . She received a visit in Harlem, Rachel asked to speak with me alone, at a cof- experience that they were all realizing they missed. During one sian in another, Dominican in another—the kind of New York                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   to see it.

They ate traditional Chinese food in one friend’s home, Rus-                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     it looked like they had never lived there. Rachel couldn’t bear spring break in a few months.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  The Cruzes had poured themselves into that house. Now changed the subject when they asked about visiting again for                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 outside, rotting.
